title: Updated textures in old versions
description: New minecraft textures in version 1.8.8 and 1.12 specifically made for Eaglercraft to get the new minecraft feel in older versions
body:
Pack works in eaglercraft and vanilla

New minecraft textures in version 1.8.8 and 1.12 for Eaglercraft to get the new minecraft feel in old versions

All textures are the newest version textures.

Examples/Images - sites.google.com/view/texturepackexamples 

Message me in discord for bugs and requests -
darker0665

Eaglercraft - Main eaglercraft website (think vanilla minecraft)

https://eaglercraft.com

Resent client - Top eaglercraft client, buffs performance, has most features and allows you to join hypixel

https://resent5.pages.dev/

Modern client - Best for pvp features and pure fps + some via textures (see below)

https://modernclient.online

Tuff client - Best for via textures and y0

https://github.com/TuffNetwork/Tuff-Client-Builds/releases

Common FAQ -
Q - Can you view textures of blocks and items added after the version you are playing on (like netherite) on via version servers?
A - Not with a texture pack alone, use Modern or Tuff client (linked above). This is very buggy, I would still reccomend using my texture pack along with these clients
Q - What bugs come with this pack
A - 1.8.8 boats, Potions, these will be fixed in next updates
Q - Will bugs be fixed in the future
A - Yes! Please DM me in discord at darker0665 about bugs, and they will be fixed!

Latest changes 

1.12 version 1.3

Boat inventory textures (fixed)
Tripwire hook inventory texture (fixed) 
Jack O lantern block + inventory texture (fixed)
Observer block + inventory texture (fixed)
Door inventory texture (fixed)

1.12 version 1.4

Popped chorus fruit inventory texture (fixed)
Tipped arrows inventory textures (fixed)
Spectral arrow inventory texture (fixed)
All fish inventory textures (fixed)
Redstone torch (in progress)
Sugar cane inventory texture (fixed)
Lingering potion inventory texture (fixed)
